Test name: CPNCO (30 km/h)

Test Description

In this scenario, the subject vehicle travels forwards towards a pedestrian which is crossing in a perpendicular direction from the nearside of the vehicle, from behind an obstruction.

  • Regulation or protocol: EURONCAP 2023 TP AEB/LSS VRU
  • Ego speed: 30 km/h
  • Target speed: 5 km/h
  • Target start distance: 4 m
  • Obstruction vehicle distance to ego vehicle: 1 m
  • Obstruction vehicle distance to target: 1 m
  • Overlap: 50%
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1
←CPNC (60 km/h) CPNCO (30 km/h) CPNCO (50 km/h)→


Test Summary

Observations

Autobrains system has less detections than Mobileye, but overall the results are better.
